title: The SOC Files: Time to “Sapecar”. Unpacking a new Horabot campaign in Mexico

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — The SOC Files: Time to “Sapecar”. Unpacking a new Horabot ca
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*aufal.filevexcasv*'
            - '*cfg.brasilinst*'
            - '*cgf.facturastbs*'
            - '*cgf.midasx*'
            - '*cgf.midasx.site*'
            - '*evs.grupotuis*'
            - '*obfuscated.endswith*'
            - '*obfuscated.startswith*'
            - '*page.url*'
            - '*page.url.keyword*'
            - '*pdj.gruposhac*'
            - '*pe.exports*'
            - '*thea.gruposhac*'
            - '*upstar.pics*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
